## Summary

- What does this change do?
- Why is it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm run lint:check`
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] Other validation details added below

## Docs

- [ ] No docs update needed
- [ ] Updated `README.md`
- [ ] Updated `README.zh-CN.md`
- [ ] Updated other docs

## Screenshots or recordings

- UI changes: add screenshots or a short recording when helpful
- No UI changes

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the renderer/Main API boundary rules in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I did not add direct renderer calls to local Gateway endpoints
- [ ] I considered security or secret-handling impact for this change
